summary: The workspace directory name and the lock filename are private consts in four modules under two names each — consolidate onto one home the whole crate reads them from

edit.description: The home: `pub const` for the workspace directory name (`.temper`) and the lock filename (`lock.toml`), beside the existing `pub const VERSION`. `pub`, not `pub(crate)` — main.rs is a separate bin crate consuming this lib, so a crate-private const cannot reach it.

Retire the local `TEMPER_DIR` (45) and `LOCK_FILE` (49); derive `DEFAULT_WORKSPACE` (41, `"./.temper"`) from the shared const rather than re-spelling the literal. `resolve_harness_path` then reads the one home.
Retire `WORKSPACE_DIR` (56) — the second name for the one concept — and read the shared const at its use sites (421, 500, 653).

Retire `LOCK_FILENAME` (27) and `TEMPER_DIR` (34), reading the shared consts; keep each doc comment's discovery-fencing rationale at its use site (273, 277, 299) — that is import's own job, not the literal's.

Retire `TEMPER_DIR` (41) — its doc comment already confesses it "mirrors `install.rs`'s own copy of the same literal" — and read the shared const at 283, 629. This entry is also the carrier for the standing citation-staleness rider on this file (open-questions, "Rust engine narration cites lag the SDK clause re-fetch"): `SETTINGS_DOC` (76) cites code.claude.com/docs/en/settings @2026-07-02 while the SDK's clause cites were re-fetched 07-15 — the fact holds, only the date lags, so re-verify the URL live and bump the retrieval date.

acceptance: One home spells `.temper` and one spells `lock.toml`: `rg '= "\.temper"|= "lock\.toml"' src/` returns the home alone. Behavior unchanged — `cargo test` green with no test edited, `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean.
notes: Sweep finding, f632c71..169e62f. 7367c1e consolidated the lock *probe* (harness_diagnostics → resolve_harness_path, one resolver for check + install) but left the literals it reads split five ways. Pure refactor: no behavior moves, so no new test — the existing suites are the regression net. Test fixtures spell `.temper` inline; out of scope (test data, not a const surface). scoped at 169e62f.

summary: The packaging remainder after the linux-x64+win32-x64 first cut: darwin binaries (Apple notarizing), the plugin/bundle + marketplace.json, and the binary↔npm version lockstep at the v0.1 tag

gate.reason: Human release actions: John's Apple notarizing for the darwin standalone binary + darwin optionalDependency package; the v0.1 launch tag that flips the binary's self-reported crate version (0.1.0) into lockstep with npm's 0.0.x. Channel 3 (plugin/bundle + marketplace.json) is a git repo + marketplace.json + free community web form (verified 2026-07-06, code.claude.com/docs) — no signing creds — but rides the same release-workflow build-out. release.yml (channel 2, linux-x64+win32-x64) + the SDK launcher/optionalDependencies + standalone tag assets shipped 07-11; the standalone-asset step is wired but unexercised until a tag fires.

edit.description: Extend the existing release.yml (linux-x64 + win32-x64 first cut) with the darwin matrix targets (aarch64/x86_64-apple-darwin) + an Apple notarization step, and a channel-3 step producing/publishing the `temper bundle` output with its marketplace.json. Distinct from the standalone tag-asset step, already wired (unexercised until a tag).

acceptance: A stranger acquires temper on all three OSes without a Rust toolchain (darwin binary notarized + pinned), or via the plugin/bundle (marketplace.json); the binary self-reports 0.1.0 in lockstep with the v0.1 npm cut (distribution.md: prebuilt binaries install on all three OSes; lockstep engine pin).
notes: Supersedes retired PACKAGING-CHANNELS (John, 07-11): both its file claims were dead — release.yml now exists (its `new` claim fails the refs gate) and the root-package.json launcher was ruled out (the launcher + optionalDependencies live on the SDK, distribution.md 'What ships'). Release infra outside src/; cargo gates can't validate npm/bundle publish. Park re-tested at 169e62f: no version tag, crate 0.1.0 vs npm 0.0.7, release.yml still defers darwin. scoped at b676656.
